curation_notes: Patch commit is the merge of PR #1 (748f60b). The only non-test source file changed is rediswrapper/models.py, which modifies from_value and to_value. The vulnerability is insecure deserialization via pickle.loads on untrusted Redis data in to_value. from_value is also included as it was changed by the patch to remove a special-case bypass for basestring types. storage.py imports and calls these functions but does not contain its own vulnerable pattern. Pre-assigned class insecure-deserialization is correct per CWE-502 and the advisory description.
